$comment: MCP .mcp.json generation template (REQ-C-002), consumed by the /moai --project survey-driven generation flow owned by SPEC-MOC-PM-ADVISORS-001 (interface contract: design.md §H). This SPEC delivers the template + the catalog it draws from; the act of writing a target project's .mcp.json is the sibling SPEC's flow. Each key under mcpServers is the exact fragment to emit for that server when selected — no credential literals appear anywhere in this file (REQ-C-005). claude-in-chrome is intentionally absent (guidance-only, REQ-C-003 — it generates no server entry).
